messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

  "node_id": "0097",
  "title": "港澳台移动游戏收入TOP榜",

Section text:
## 港澳台移动游戏收入TOP榜

message.content: This section introduces a revenue-based ranking of mobile games in the Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan markets. It is designed to answer questions regarding which mobile games generate the highest gross revenue in these regions, the relative ranking positions of top-performing titles, and the revenue metrics used to establish the list. The heading implies the presence of a table or figure displaying the ranked games, though no specific game titles, publication dates, numerical values, ranking methodologies, or procedural definitions are provided in the text. It serves as a reference for regional market performance and revenue leadership in the mobile gaming sector.

response_text: This section introduces a revenue-based ranking of mobile games in the Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan markets. It is designed to answer questions regarding which mobile games generate the highest gross revenue in these regions, the relative ranking positions of top-performing titles, and the revenue metrics used to establish the list.
